@@
A. The primary issues stem from agents ignoring each other's input, repeatedly asking for the same information despite receiving a response indicating the information is unavailable, and prematurely terminating tasks. There are also instances of weak verification, disobeying task specifications, action-reasoning mismatches, step repetition, loss of conversation history, and task derailment. Several instances of information withholding and ignoring suggestions from other agents are also present.

B. no

C. 
1.1 no 
1.2 no 
1.3 yes (multiple instances of repeating the same thought or information)
1.4 yes (evident in the multiple restarts of the astropy agent)
1.5 yes (seen in the ribbon problem where the agent continues to ask for information it already knows is missing)
2.1 yes (multiple instances of the astropy agent restarting)
2.2 no 
2.3 yes (the astropy agent proposing simplified implementations instead of finding the actual code)
2.4 yes (the navigator withholding the full code and only providing snippets)
2.6 yes (the astropy agent's reasoning about the problem doesn't align with its actions)
3.1 yes (the spotify task was prematurely terminated)
3.2 yes (the code reviewer in the sudoku example didn't thoroughly check the logic)
